title: Weekly reports with status and updates summary from several boards
excerpt:
Hi, I would like to request a new feature: 
This will include a weekly (or custom time) report, in which all the updates, including notes, mentions, changes in every column from a board or several boards are summarized i…

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I would like to request a new feature:
This will include a weekly (or custom time) report, in which all the updates, including notes, mentions, changes in every column from a board or several boards are summarized in an email for a team/s.

This will be different than the update widget and the feed since they only include manual updates on the item and not changes in the status or dates, text columns etc.

Also, I cannot do that with automations since I want information from several items to be included instead of having one email per item which will saturate my colleagues inbox.

I have already spoken with the support team and there is nothing that could solve this at the moment but it will be of great value for my team so please can you consider it for development in the future?

Thank you!

posts.author: Gisell.Medina (Gisell Medina)
posts.cookedHtml:
AMEN!!!
I am working on automations to help capture status changes in the updates section… but its still not everything like you are suggesting.
But yes… 100% I NEED THIS, especially for meeting summaries.
I find it hard to believe that only out of the 127 viewers… i am the only person who has voted for this… as this would solve the VAST majority of my issues.
VOTE VOTE VOTE VOTE!

posts.author: Emely (Emely Pineda)
posts.cookedHtml: Awesome suggestion. Hopefully this gets mondays attention!

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you Giselle! I have found an app that maybe somehow of a solution but it is not perfect still, maybe it can help you! It is called Analysis and Reports by Screenful. I am in a free trial and it seems promising but it would be awesome that monday implements this in the platform for all to use.

posts.author: cbulin (Chris B)
posts.cookedHtml: I was just looking for this kind of reporting, and I would love to be able to send it to a Slack channel

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Susana,
MAy I ask please why it’s not a perfect fit for your case and you see an ideal scenario?

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would love for it to be integrated within monday work. Also, the report is sent as an attachment to the email. In an ideal world, the summary would be within the email. It lets you customize the report but there are some limitations, it cannot detect the changes that are made, it works by saying the status of new items or current items. I would love the focus to be on the changes, so if there is an update on a item, this would be displayed or if the estimated due date is modified it states it clearly.

I like the app and my team has purchased it, but there is room for improvement in my case.

I hope this helps!

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml: Thnak you Susana for your opinion . May I ask ‘by the app’ you mean the one by Screenful as discussued above? (you can just add like if it’s so)

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, I mean Analysis and Reports by Screenful

posts.author: k.pletneva (Kate  Pletneva)
posts.cookedHtml: That’s a great request, would be super-useful for my team as well! We are doing weekly status updates in a high-level Projects Overview board that has all the projects from my team as items, and I would love to have the ability to send a report/export the updates from this board every Friday filtered by owner/status/etc. Would be a game-changer since now we have to do it manually

posts.author: Iryna_Belaya (Iryna Belaya)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello @Susana ,
We developed the app, Board Email Reports, that addresses your problem.
The app has 2 kinds of automated reports and one of them is dedicated for item updates over specific period:

  • Updates by a specific employee
  • Updates mentioning a specific employee
  • Updates containing attachments
  • Status updates
  • Last updates
    Another set of reports is dedicated for board changes.
    The reports are sent via email and contain changes roundup in the email body with a detailed xls-report as attachment to the letter:
    image424×469 24.9 KB

    This is what the report contains:
    image1461×752 99.9 KB

You can try it out for free and check if it works for your case.

Just mention here other participants on the request who this info might be useful: @TKingSH , @k.pletneva , @cbulin , @Gisell.Medina

posts.author: TKingSH (Tami King)
posts.cookedHtml:
While I appreciate the app suggestion from Iryna, I’m looking for something inside monday.com that allows me to create a WSR. Where i can choose what I want to be included and it populates on a report.

image1704×869 52.5 KB
